input: heterogeneous information network (HIN) of users, locations, and contextual relations
backbone: subgraph-based graph embedding (random walk + node embedding)
loss: not specified (implicitly from embedding learning, e.g., skip-gram)
key_idea: build user subgraphs based on location context, then perform random walks on these subgraphs to learn node embeddings for recommendation
datasets: benchmark LBSN datasets (not named in abstract)
